name: Slipped on debris but no police report in Boise—what proof?

mainEntity.name: Slipped on debris but no police report in Boise—what proof?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Employer incident form, photos, medicals, coworkers suffice.** Idaho accepts circumstantial evidence.[2] Key factors: (1) Timely supervisor notice; (2) site logs exist; (3) experts reconstruct; (4) discovery uncovers.[2][1] Notify writing, daily photos, get statements. Builds case without police.
